title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates:
Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio Asia Pacific Associates!
